raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A white sink with a faucet is on a countertop. A pink block is on the countertop to the left of the sink. The block is a solid cube. STRATEGY - Reach the block, grasp it, and transport it to the sink. Failure modes include missing the block or dropping it during transport. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the block at its body; Step 2 grasp the block at its body for a secure hold; Step 3 transport the block to the sink basin; Step 4 place the block in the sink.
Goal: inside(pink_block, sink)
Scene: pink_block, sink, countertop
Step 1: reach(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink block
  contact: holding(pink_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_block)
Step 3: transport(pink_block -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink basin
  spatial: inside(pink_block, sink) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(pink_block)
  done_when: inside(pink_block, sink)
Step 4: place(pink_block -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink basin
  contact: surface_contact(pink_block, sink) [completion]; released(pink_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_block, sink) AND released(pink_block)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the pink block
the body of the pink block
an empty area inside the sink basin
an empty area inside the sink basin
